seoTitle: Lugarno vs Luskintyre — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lugarno and Luskintyre. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lugarno and Luskintyre.
heading: Lugarno vs Luskintyre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lugarno, New South Wales and Luskintyre, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Luskintyre has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Lugarno (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lugarno or Luskintyre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lugarno has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Luskintyre scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lugarno scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Luskintyre scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lugarno or Luskintyre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Luskintyre has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
